eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Bannock; Bingham, ID; at 8:00 PM on JUL 19, 2026 Effective until 10:00 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is an activation of the Endangered Missing Person Alert system.  The Pocatello Police Department is looking for a missing person who was last seen at the Fort Hall Casino in Bingham County and is believed to be in danger. She is a 68 year old Native American female with black hair with grey roots and brown eyes . She was last seen on July 17th. If you have any information on the where abouts of this missing person please contact Pocatello Police Department at 2 0 8 2 3 4 6 1 0 0 immediately.
